entity.summary: European regulated centralized trading venue providing spot crypto markets and professional-grade trading infrastructure under the current One Trading brand.
entity.notes: Current first-party pages identify One Trading Exchange B.V. as a Netherlands-based regulated venue authorised to operate a crypto-asset trading platform and custody services. Current independent market data reports recently updated spot pairs and non-zero volume. Bitpanda Pro is retained as a historical alias from the public rebrand, without creating a separate predecessor entity or unsupported transition event in this routine growth batch.

evidence.title: One Trading regulated exchange and venue overview
evidence.notes: Current first-party page describes One Trading as an integrated regulated trading venue and identifies One Trading Exchange B.V. in the Netherlands as the current operating entity.

evidence.title: One Trading spot markets and exchange profile
evidence.notes: Current independent exchange profile records the Bitpanda Pro rebrand, lists recently updated spot pairs, and reports non-zero 24-hour trading volume, supporting active classification.
